for which would mean that the four watches of the day
(not of the night) alone are to be considered for prognostication.
In this case one watch is equal to one month. It is understandable
that watching the movement of the flag at night is extremely diffi-
cult. Bhattotpala says that the latter reading is preferable in the
light of Varaha's assertion that he is following in the footsteps of
Garga, Parasara and others whose opinion agrees with this reading.
